def positive_deque_candidate_queue():
    rule_id = "deque_candidate_queue"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Queue-style list operations like pop(0) or insert(0, ...) that may want collections.deque."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
